summary: MyCity child care applications grew rapidly after the portal's Fiscal 2023 launch, peaking in FY25, which OTI's own reporting calls a record year for the service. The FY26 figure in this dataset reflects only the first several months of the fiscal year (OTI reported a roughly 15 percent year-over-year decrease over that partial period), so it is not directly comparable to the full-year FY25 total.

sources.label: OTI, Preliminary Fiscal 2026 Mayor's Management Report
